title: CBIC Rolls Out New E-Filing for HSNS Cess Sealing/De-Sealing Requests
content:
# CBIC Rolls Out New E-Filing for HSNS Cess Sealing/De-Sealing Requests

Ek important update hai. Government ne HSNS Cess Taxpayers ke liye Request for Sealing (Intimation INT-01) aur De-Sealing (Intimation INT-02) ki e-filing functionality enable ki hai.

*   **What's New:** HSNS Cess Taxpayers can now electronically file Intimation INT-01 (Request for Sealing) and Intimation INT-02 (Request for De-Sealing) on the CBIC portal.
*   **Effective Date:** This new e-filing functionality is live from May 29, 2026.
*   **Why This Matters:** This initiative aims to streamline the process for sealing and de-sealing premises related to HSNS Cess, making compliance easier and more efficient for taxpayers.
*   **Official Communication:** As per the announcement on the CBIC portal, a detailed Advisory regarding this new functionality is expected to be issued shortly.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic-gst.gov.in/)

*Published on: 28 May 2026*
